transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00030, derived from source AUC-030) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-NEURO-01 bucket; NEURO used as primary specialty tag with PAEDS as secondary given the paediatric patient.

Source note title references both Lennox-Gastaut and Dravet syndromes generically; this specific case's clinical content (multiple seizure types, drop attacks, developmental regression) is most consistent with Lennox-Gastaut syndrome specifically, which was used for the primary_diagnosis coding — flagged for maintainer confirmation.

Source note describes in-person buccal midazolam administration and wound closure with Steri-Strips already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.
Vitals and detailed neurological/pupillary examination findings were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.
Patient age (6) and weight taken directly from source; paediatric_context fields populated per protocol given the patient is a child with a caregiver present.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
